# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: HelmChartTemplate
metadata:  # metadata section omitted in this case as it's not necessary or needed within a helm chart template itself, only inside values/defaults files that can contain arbitrary yaml. But keep the structure intact for clarification purposes (unless otherwise specified).  
spec:  # spec is where actual specifications of charts and releases live; usually omitted in templates because it's unnecessary unless necessary or desired to include all content within a release. Omitted here as not needed when there are no values/default files mentioned directly inside the template section itself that can contain arbitrary yaml for example {"key": "value"}.
helm:  # helm is where declarative concepts of Helm Chart releases live; usually omitted in templates because it's unnecessary unless necessary or desired to include all content within a release. Omitted here as not needed when there are no values/default files mentioned directly inside the template section itself that can contain arbitrary yaml for example {"key": "value"}.
